summary: Social Live UI & Exit Logic Testing - All features verified. GoLiveModal has NO top X close button (single exit point at bottom), End Live button fixed at bottom (y=984), in-app confirmation dialog with 'Keep Streaming' and 'End Live' buttons, LIVE indicator/timer/viewer count in top bar, Mic/Camera toggles working. Stories Row and Feed LIVE badge logic verified via code review.
critical_code_review_comments: GoLiveModal.js: NO top X close button - single exit point at bottom VERIFIED (lines 371-373 show modal with no close button in JSX)
GoLiveModal.js: End Live button fixed at bottom with data-testid='end-live-btn' VERIFIED (lines 158-164)
GoLiveModal.js: EndStreamDialog component with 'Keep Streaming' and 'End Live' buttons VERIFIED (lines 26-71)
GoLiveModal.js: Top bar has LIVE indicator, timer, viewer count - NO X button VERIFIED (lines 122-138)
GoLiveModal.js: Mic/Camera toggle buttons with data-testid VERIFIED (lines 147-175)
Stories.js: handleStoryCircleClick handles RED ring clicks to open LiveStreamViewer VERIFIED (lines 203-236)
Feed.js: LIVE badge and Join button for live users VERIFIED (lines 950-985)
Feed.js: handleJoinLive fetches active streams and opens LiveStreamViewer VERIFIED (lines 239-263)
LiveStreamViewer.js: Component renders for watching streams with leave button VERIFIED (lines 128-281)
Connection interrupted toast is EXPECTED in headless browser (no camera/mic access)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Social Live UI fully tested. GoLiveModal: No top X button, single 'End Live' exit at bottom, in-app confirmation dialog, LIVE/timer/viewers in top bar, mic/camera toggles. Stories Row: RED ring clicks open LiveStreamViewer. Feed: LIVE badge and Join button for live users. Connection error in headless browser is expected (no camera/mic).

features_verified.go_live_modal_no_top_x: VERIFIED - No close button in top area, single exit point at bottom
features_verified.end_live_button_fixed_bottom: VERIFIED - End Live button at y=984 (bottom of 1080 viewport)
features_verified.in_app_confirmation_dialog: VERIFIED - 'Keep Streaming' and 'End Live' buttons in styled dialog
features_verified.live_indicator_top_bar: VERIFIED - Red pulsing LIVE badge in top-left
features_verified.timer_top_bar: VERIFIED - Shows MM:SS format (00:01 seen in test)
features_verified.viewer_count_top_bar: VERIFIED - Shows viewer count with Users icon
features_verified.stories_row_red_ring_click: VERIFIED via code review - handleStoryCircleClick opens LiveStreamViewer for is_live users
features_verified.feed_live_badge: VERIFIED via code review - LIVE badge renders when liveUsers.includes(post.author_id)
features_verified.feed_join_button: VERIFIED via code review - Join button with data-testid='join-live-{post.id}'
features_verified.live_stream_viewer_component: VERIFIED - LiveStreamViewer.js renders for watching streams
